name: Sharjah
description: Sharjah ( , Gulf Arabic: aš-Šārja ) is a major port city and the third-most populous city in the United Arab Emirates, after Dubai and Abu Dhabi.  It is the capital of the Emirate of Sharjah and forms part of the Dubai-Sharjah-Ajman metropolitan area.  The emirate shares legal, political, military and economic functions with the other emirates of the UAE within a federal framework.
